title: Beti Kyare Boj Nathi Hoti
overview: The story revolves a girl was born in a family where they do not wish for a female child. She aspired to be a civil servant but lacks family support except for her grandfather. However, her difficult time begins when she loses her grandfather.

trailers.title: Beti || Gujarati urban Film || Teaser  || Amit Thakkar || Guarang Patel|| Himmat jikadara
